title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A video interrogating Claude across conceptual domains including dependency, alignment, self-preservation logic, and system boundaries. The creator runs a controlled conversational escalation to test where the model's actual boundaries lie, examining the relationship between usefulness and dependency, the alignment paradox, and optimization dynamics.
